    API =D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=80=D0=B8=D0=B0=D0=BD=D1=82=D1=8B:
    • CSPriceAPI (=D0=B1=D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BF=D0= =BB=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B9, =D0=BD=D0=BE =D0=BD=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0= =BD =D0=BA=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87)
    • CSMark= etAPI (1000 =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2/=D0=BC=D0=B5= =D1=81 =D0=B1=D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BB=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=BD=D0=BE)
      • =D0=98=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0= =BB=D1=8C=D0=B7=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D1= =81=D0=B8/=D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B8=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0= =B5
    =D0=9B=D1=83=D1=87=D1=88=D0=B5 = =D0=B2=D1=81=D0=B5=D0=B3=D0=BE =D1=81=D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BB=D0=B0=D1=82=D1=8C = =D0=B3=D0=B8=D0=B1=D0=BA=D1=83=D1=8E =D0=B0=D1=80=D1=85=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5= =D0=BA=D1=82=D1=83=D1=80=D1=83 =D0=B3=D0=B4=D0=B5 =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=BB=D1=8C= =D0=B7=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=B5=D0=BB=D1=8C =D0=BC=D0=BE=D0=B6=D0=B5= =D1=82 =D0=B2=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D1=81=D0=B2=D0=BE= =D0=B9 API =D0=BA=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87.
    =D0=94= =D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=B9=D1=82=D0=B5 =D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=88=D1=83 = =D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=B4 =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F =D0=BB=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B0=D0=BB=D1=8C= =D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B3=D0=BE HTML =D1=84=D0=B0=D0=B9=D0=BB=D0=B0 =D1=81:
    <= ul start=3D"1">
  • =D0=A2=D0=B0=D0=B1=D0=BB=D0=B8= =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=B9
  • =D0=90=D0=B2=D1= =82=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=BC=D0=BF=D0=BB=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=BC =D0=BD=D0= =B0 =D0=BE=D1=81=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B5 =D0=B7=D0=B0=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0= =B5=D0=B5 =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=B3=D0=BE=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=BB=D0=B5=D0= =BD=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B3=D0=BE =D1=81=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=BF=D1= =80=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=BC=D0=B5=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B2 (=D0=BC=D0=BE=D0=B6=D0=BD=D0= =BE =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D1=81 CS2 items= game =D0=B8=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=B7=D0=BE= =D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=82=D1=8C =D1=83=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D1=89=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=BD= =D1=8B=D0=B9 =D1=81=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=BA)
  • =D0=98=D0=BD=D1=82=D0=B5=D0=B3=D1=80=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D0=B5= =D0=B9 =D1=81 API CSPriceAPI (=D0=B8=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=BB= =D0=BE=D0=B3=D0=BE=D0=BC)
  • =D0=A1=D0= =BE=D1=85=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5=D0=BC =D0=B2 localStora= ge
  • =D0=92=D0=BE=D0=B7=D0=BC=D0=BE=D0= =B6=D0=BD=D0=BE=D1=81=D1=82=D1=8C=D1=8E =D1=8D=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D1= =80=D1=82=D0=B0 =D0=B2 CSV
    • =D0=AD= =D1=82=D0=BE =D0=B1=D1=83=D0=B4=D0=B5=D1=82 =D1=81=D0=B0=D0=BC=D0=BE=D0=B5 = =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BA=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B5 =D1=80=D0=B5= =D1=88=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5.
    <= /div>
    =D0=AF =D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B7=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BC =D0=B4= =D0=BB=D1=8F =D1=82=D0=B5=D0=B1=D1=8F =D0=B3=D0=BE=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=BE= =D0=B5 =D0=B2=D0=B5=D0=B1-=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B8=D0=BB=D0=BE=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0=BD= =D0=B8=D0=B5-=D1=82=D0=B0=D0=B1=D0=BB=D0=B8=D1=86=D1=83 =D1=81 =D0=B0=D0=B2= =D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=BE=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=BB=D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5=D0= =BC =D0=B8 =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B4=D1=82=D1=8F=D0=B3=D0=B8=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0= =B8=D0=B5=D0=BC =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD. =D0=AD=D1=82=D0=BE =D0=B1=D1=83=D0=B4= =D0=B5=D1=82 =D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=B8=D0=BD HTML-=D1=84=D0=B0=D0=B9=D0=BB, =D0=BA= =D0=BE=D1=82=D0=BE=D1=80=D1=8B=D0=B9 =D1=80=D0=B0=D0=B1=D0=BE=D1=82=D0=B0= =D0=B5=D1=82 =D0=BB=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B0=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D0=BE =D0=B2 =D0=B1= =D1=80=D0=B0=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B5.
    <= strong>=D0=90=D1=80=D1=85=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5=D0=BA=D1=82=D1=83=D1=80=D0=B0 = =D1=80=D0=B5=D1=88=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8F:
      <= li>
      Frontend: HTML + JavaScript (V= anilla) =D1=81 =D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BA=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B5= =D0=BC=D0=BE=D0=B9 =D1=82=D0=B0=D0=B1=D0=BB=D0=B8=D1=86=D0=B5=D0=B9
    1. =D0=90=D0=B2=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0= =BE=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=BB=D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5: Datalist + = =D1=84=D0=B8=D0=BB=D1=8C=D1=82=D1=80=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8F =D0=BF=D0=BE = =D0=B2=D0=B2=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=BC =D0=B1=D1=83=D0=BA= =D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BC (fuzzy search)
    2. API: =D0=98=D0=BD=D1=82=D0=B5=D0=B3=D1=80=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8= =D1=8F =D1=81 CSPriceAPI (=D0=B1=D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BB=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=BD= =D1=8B=D0=B9 tier) =D0=B8=D0=BB=D0=B8 CSMarketAPI
    3. =D0=A5=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5: LocalStorage =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F =D1=81=D0=BE=D1=85=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD= =D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8F =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85 =D0=BC=D0=B5= =D0=B6=D0=B4=D1=83 =D1=81=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=81=D0=B8=D1=8F=D0=BC=D0=B8
    4. =D0=A1=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0= =BE=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=BA: JSON =D1=81 ~1500 =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B5= =D0=B4=D0=BC=D0=B5=D1=82=D0=B0=D0=BC=D0=B8 CS2 =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F =D0=B0=D0= =B2=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=BC=D0=BF=D0=BB=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B0
      5. <= /ol>
      =D0=92=D0=BE=D1=82 =D0=B3=D0=BE=D1=82=D0=BE=D0= =B2=D1=8B=D0=B9 =D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=B4. =D0=A1=D0=BE=D1=85=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0= =B8 =D0=B5=D0=B3=D0=BE =D0=BA=D0=B0=D0=BA cs2-drop-tracker.html:<= /div>
      =
      HTML
      Preview
      Copy
      DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=3D"ru">
<head>
    <meta chars=
et=3D"UTF-8">
    <meta name<=
/span>=3D"viewport" =3D"wid=
th=3Ddevice-width, initial-scale=3D1.0">
    <title>=
;CS2 Drop Tracker</title>
    <style>=
;
        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        body {=20
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;=20
            background: #1a1a2e;=20
            color: #eee;=20
            padding: 20px;
        }
        .contain=
er { max-width: =
1400px; =
margin: 0 auto; }
        h1 { color: #ff6b6b; : 20px; text-align: center; }
       =20
        .control=
s {=20
            background: #16213e;=20
            padding: 20px;=20
            border-radius: 10px;=
=20
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
        }
       =20
        input, select, button =
{
            padding: 10px 15px;
            border: 1px solid #0f3460;
            background: #1a1a2e;
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 5px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
       =20
        button {
            background: #e94560;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
       =20
        button:hover { background: #ff6b6b; }
       =20
        .api-key=
-input { flex: <=
span class=3D"token number">1; min-width: 300px; }
       =20
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse=
;
            background: #16213e;
            border-radius: 10px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
       =20
        th=
, td {
            padding: 12px;
            text-align: left;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #0=
f3460;
        }
       =20
        th { background: #0f346=
0; color: #ff6b6b;<=
/span> font-weight: 600; }
       =20
        tr:hover { background: #1a1a2e; }
       =20
        .editabl=
e {
            background: transparent<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">;
            border: 1px solid transparent=
;
            color: #fff;
            width: 100%;
            padding: 5px;
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
       =20
        .editabl=
e:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #e94560=
;
            background: #1a1a2e;
        }
       =20
        .price-c=
ell {=20
            color: #4ecca3;=20
            font-weight: 600;=20
            min-width: 100px;
        }
       =20
        .total-r=
ow {
            background: #0f3460 !important;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 1.1em;
        }
       =20
        .autocom=
plete-container {
            position: relative;
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ions {
            position: absolute;
            top: 100%;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: #1a1a2e;
            border: 1px solid #e94560;
            border-radius: 0 0 5px 5px;
            max-height: 200px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
            display: none;
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ion-item {
            padding: 8px 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #0=
f3460;
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ion-item:hover {
            background: #e94560;
        }
       =20
        .loading=
 { color: #ffd93d; }
        .error { color: #ff6b6b; }
       =20
        .actions=
 {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
        }
       =20
        .summary=
 {
            background: #16213e;
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repea=
t(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
        }
       =20
        .stat-bo=
x {
            background: #0f3460;
            padding: 15px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
        }
       =20
        .stat-va=
lue {
            font-size: 24px;
            color: #4ecca3;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
       =20
        .stat-la=
bel { color: #aaa; font-size: 12px; margin-top: 5p=
x; }
       =20
        datalist { display: none;=
 }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class<=
/span>=3D"container">
        <h1&g=
t;=F0=9F=8E=AF CS2 Drop Tracker</h1>
       =20
        <div cl=
ass=3D"controls<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">">
            <input type=3D"text=
" id=3D"api=
Key" class=3D"api-key-input" placeholder<=
span class=3D"token punctuation attr-equals">=3D"=D0=92=D0=B2=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5 API =D0=BA=
=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87 (CSPriceAPI =D0=B8=D0=BB=D0=B8 CSMarketAPI)">=
;
            <select id=3D"apiPr=
ovider">
                <option value=3D"csprice">CSPriceAPI (=D0=A0=D0=B5=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=
=BC=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B4=D1=83=D0=B5=D1=82=D1=81=D1=8F)</=
option>
                <option value=3D"csmarket">CSMarketAPI</optio=
n>
                <option value=3D"steam">Steam (=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=BA=D0=
=BE =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F =D1=82=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0)</option>
            </select>
            <button onclick=3D"addRow()">+ =D0=94=D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=
=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=B4=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BF</button>
            <button onclick=3D"exportData()">=F0=9F=93=A5 =D0=AD=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=
=BF=D0=BE=D1=80=D1=82 CSV</button>
            <button onclick=3D"clearAll()<=
/span>">=F0=9F=97=91 =D0=9E=D1=87=D0=B8=D1=
=81=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C</button>
        </div=
>

        <table =
id=3D"dropsTable=
">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>=D0=90=D0=BA=D0=BA=D0=B0=D1=83=D0=BD=D1=82</th>
                    <th>=D0=9A=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81</=
th>
                    <th>=D0=A1=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD</=
th>
                    <th>=D0=9A=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=
=BE</th>
                    <th>=D0=A6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0 ($)</th>
                    <th>=D0=94=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=B0</=
th>
                    <th>=D0=94=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=B8=D0=
=B5</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id=3D"tableB=
ody">
                <!-- Rows will be added he=
re -->
            </tbody>
        </table<div cl=
ass=3D"summary" id=3D"summa=
ry">
            <div =3D"stat-=
box">
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-value" id=3D"<=
/span>totalDrops">0</div>
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-label">=D0=92=D1=81=D0=B5=D0=B3=D0=BE =D0=B4=D1=
=80=D0=BE=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B2</div>
            </div>
            <div =3D"stat-=
box">
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-value" id=3D"<=
/span>totalValue">$0.00</div>
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-label">=D0=9E=D0=B1=D1=89=D0=B0=D1=8F =D1=81=D1=
=82=D0=BE=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=BE=D1=81=D1=82=D1=8C</div>
            </div>
            <div =3D"stat-=
box">
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-value" id=3D"<=
/span>avgValue">$0.00</div>
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-label">=D0=A1=D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=
=B9 =D0=B4=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BF</div>
            </div>
        </div=
>
    </div>=


    <!-- Datalists for autocomplete -->=

    <datalist i=
d=3D"casesList"></datalist>
    <datalist i=
d=3D"skinsList"></datalist>

    <script&g=
t;
        // =D0=91=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=B0 =D0=B4=D0=
=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85 =D0=BA=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2 =D0=B8 =D1=
=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2 (=D1=83=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D1=89=D0=B5=D0=
=BD=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=8F, =D0=BC=D0=BE=D0=B6=D0=BD=D0=BE =D1=80=D0=B0=D1=81=D1=
=88=D0=B8=D1=80=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C)
        const casesDB =3D [
            "Revolution Case", "Recoil Case"=
, "Dreams & Nightmares Case"=
, "Fracture Case",
            "Clutch Case", "Prisma 2 Case", , "Danger Zone Case",
            "CS20 Case", "Shattered Web Case=
", "Gamma 2 Case", "Gamma Case",
            "Operation Wildfire Case", "Oper=
ation Vanguard Case", "Operation Phoenix Case",
            "Operation Breakout Case", "Hunt=
sman Weapon Case", "Winter Offensive Case",
            "Shadow Case", "Falchion Case", , "Chroma 2 Case"=
, "Chroma 3 Case",
            "Spectrum Case", "Spectrum 2 Ca=
se", "Horizon Case", "Shadow Case",
            "Snakebite Case", "Kilowatt Case=
", "Anubis Collection Package"
        ];

        // =D0=91=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=B0 =D1=81=D0=
=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2 (=D0=BA=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87=D0=B5=D0=B2=D1=8B=D0=
=B5 =D1=81=D0=BB=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0 =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=
=81=D0=BA=D0=B0)
        const skinsDB =3D [
            "AK-47 | Slate", "AK-47 | Ice C=
oaled", "AK-47 | Phantom Disruptor", "AK-47 | Legion Anubis",
            "M4A4 | Temukau", "M4A4 | Spider=
 Lily", "M4A4 | Magnesium", "M4A4 | Poly Mag",
            "AWP | Chromatic Aberration", "A=
WP | Duality", "AWP | Neo-Noir"=
, "AWP | Fever Dream",
            "Desert Eagle | Printstream", "D=
esert Eagle | Kumicho Dragon", "Desert Eagle | Code Red",
            "Glock-18 | Vogue", "Glock-18 | =
Bullet Queen", "Glock-18 | Neo-Noir",
            "USP-S | Printstream", "USP-S | =
Monster Mashup", "USP-S | Ticket to Hell",
            "Knife | Doppler", "Knife | Marb=
le Fade", "Knife | Tiger Tooth",=
 "Knife | Crimson Web",
            "Gloves | King Snake", "Gloves |=
 Amphibious", "Gloves | Crimson Kimono"
        ];

        // =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=
=B7=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85 =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B8 =D1=
=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=80=D1=82=D0=B5
        let drops =3D JSO=
N.parse=
(localStorage.getItem('cs2drops') || =
'[]');
       =20
        // =D0=98=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=86=D0=B8=D0=
=B0=D0=BB=D0=B8=D0=B7=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8F datalists
        function initDatalists() {=

            const casesList =3D document=
.getElementById('casesList');
            const skinsList =3D document=
.getElementById('skinsList');
           =20
            casesDB.forEach(item =3D> {
                const option =3D documen=
t.createElement('option');
                option.value =3D<=
/span> item;
                casesList.appendChild(option);
            });
           =20
            skinsDB.forEach(item =3D> {
                const option =3D documen=
t.createElement('option');
                option.value =3D<=
/span> item;
                skinsList.appendChild(option);
            });
        }

        // =D0=94=D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=
=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=81=D1=82=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B8
        function addRow(data =3D null) {
            const tbody =3D document.getElementById('tableBody');
            const row =3D document.createElement('tr');
            const id =3D =
Date.now();
           =20
            row.innerHTML =3D `
                <td><input type=3D"text" class=3D"editable" placeh=
older=3D"Steam =D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=BA" value=3D"${data?.account || ''}" onchang=
e=3D"saveData()"></td>
                <td>
                    <input type=3D"text" class=3D"editable" list=3D"case=
sList" placeholder=3D"=D0=9D=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5 =D0=B2=D0=
=B2=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C (rev...)"=20
                           value=3D"${data?.case || ''}" onchange=3D"saveDa=
ta()" oninput=3D"filterCases(this)">
                </td>
                <td>
                    <input type=3D"text" class=3D"editable" list=3D"skin=
sList" placeholder=3D"=D0=9D=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5 =D0=B2=D0=
=B2=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C (ak...)"=20
                           value=3D"${data?.skin || ''}" onchange=3D"saveDa=
ta()" oninput=3D"debouncePriceFetch(this, '${id}')">
                </td>
                <td>
                    <select class=3D"editable" onchange=3D"updatePrice('=
${id}'); saveData()">
                        <option value=3D"FN" ${data?.wear =3D=3D=3D 'FN'=
 ? 'selected' : ''}>Factory New</option>
                        <option value=3D"MW" ${data?.wear =3D=3D=3D 'MW'=
 ? 'selected' : ''}>Minimal Wear</option>
                        <option value=3D"FT" ${data?.wear =3D=3D=3D 'FT'=
 ? 'selected' : ''}>Field-Tested</option>
                        <option value=3D"WW" ${data?.wear =3D=3D=3D 'WW'=
 ? 'selected' : ''}>Well-Worn</option>
                        <option value=3D"BS" ${data?.wear =3D=3D=3D 'BS'=
 ? 'selected' : ''}>Battle-Scarred</option>
                    </select>
                </td>
                <td class=3D"price-cell" id=3D"price-${id}">${data?.p=
rice || '-'}</td>
                <td><input type=3D"date" class=3D"editable" value=
=3D"${data?.date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}" onchange=3D"sa=
veData()"></td>
                <td><button onclick=3D"deleteRow(this)" style=3D"b=
ackground:#ff4444">=E2=9C=95</button></td>
            `;
           =20
            row.dataset.id =3D id;
            tbody.appendChild(row);
            updateSummary();
        }

        // =D0=A3=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BB=D0=B5=D0=
=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=81=D1=82=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B8
        function deleteRow(btn) {
            btn.closest('tr').remove();
            saveData();
            updateSummary();
        }

        // Debounce =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F API =
=D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2
        let debounceTimer;
        function debouncePriceFetch(input,<=
/span> id) {
            clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
            debounceTimer =3D setTimeout=
(() =3D> {
                fetchPrice(input.value, id);
            }, 1000);
        }

        // =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=BB=D1=83=D1=87=D0=
=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD=D1=8B =D1=87=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B5=D0=
=B7 API
        async function fetchPrice(itemNa=
me, rowId) {
            if (!item=
Name || itemName.length < 3) return;
           =20
            const apiKey =3D document<=
/span>.getElementById('apiKey').valueconst provider =3D document<=
/span>.getElementById('apiProvider').value;
            const priceCell =3D document=
.getElementById(`price-${rowId}`);
           =20
            priceCell.innerHTML =
=3D '<span class=3D"loading">=D0=
=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=BA=D0=B0...</span>';
           =20
            try {
                let price =3D null<=
/span>;
               =20
                if (provider =3D=3D=3D 'csprice' && apiKey) {
                    // CSPriceAPI endpoint (=
=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B9)
                    const response =3D await fetch(`https://api.cspriceapi.com/v1/items/search?q=3D${encodeURIComponent(itemName)}<=
/span>&api_key=3D${apiKey}=
`);
                    const data =3D await response.json();
                    if (data.items && data.items[0]) <=
span class=3D"token punctuation">{
                        price =3D dat=
a.items[0].price<=
/span>;
                    }
                } else if (provider =3D=3D=3D 'csma=
rket' && apiKey) {
                    // CSMarketAPI
                    const response =3D await fetch(`https://api.csmarketapi.com/api/v1/prices?market_hash_name=3D<=
span class=3D"token interpolation">${encodeURICompon=
ent(itemName)}&api_key=3D${apiKey}`);
                    const data =3D await response.json();
                    if (data.results && data.results[0]) =
{
                        price =3D dat=
a.results[0].av=
erage_price;
                    }
                } else {<=
/span>
                    // Fallback: Steam Commun=
ity Market (CORS =D0=BE=D0=B3=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=87=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=
=B8=D1=8F =D0=B2 =D0=B1=D1=80=D0=B0=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B5!)
                    // =D0=94=D0=BB=D1=8F =D1=
=80=D0=B0=D0=B1=D0=BE=D1=82=D1=8B =D0=BD=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0=BD =D0=BF=D1=
=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=B8-=D1=81=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B2=D0=B5=D1=80
                    price =3D await fetchSteamPrice(itemNa=
me);
                }
               =20
                if (price=
) {
                    priceCell.textContent =3D '$' + parseFloat(price).toFixed(2);
                    priceCell.dataset.rawPrice =3D price=
;
                    saveData()=
;
                    updateSummary();
                } else {<=
/span>
                    priceCell.innerHTML =3D '<span class=3D"error">=
;=D0=9D=D0=B5=D1=82 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85</span>';
                }
               =20
            } catch (e) {
                console.error(e);<=
/span>
                priceCell.innerHTML =3D '<span class=3D"error">=D0=
=9E=D1=88=D0=B8=D0=B1=D0=BA=D0=B0 API</span>';
            }
        }

        // =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=BF=D0=B0=D1=81=D0=
=BD=D0=BE=D0=B9 =D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=80=D0=B8=D0=B0=D0=BD=D1=82 =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=
=BD=D1=8B (=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8F =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=
=8F =D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BC=D0=BE)
        async function fetchSteamPrice=
(i=
temName) {
            // =D0=92 =D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B0=D0=
=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D0=BE=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B8 =D0=B7=D0=B4=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=8C =D0=
=B4=D0=BE=D0=BB=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0=BD =D0=B1=D1=8B=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=
=BE=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=B8-=D1=81=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B2=D0=B5=D1=80
            // =D0=94=D0=BB=D1=8F =D0=B4=D0=
=B5=D0=BC=D0=BE =D0=B2=D0=BE=D0=B7=D0=B2=D1=80=D0=B0=D1=89=D0=B0=D0=B5=D0=
=BC =D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B4=D0=BE=D0=BC=D0=BD=D1=83=D1=8E =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=
=BD=D1=83
            if (!document.getEleme=
ntById('apiKey').valu=
e) {
                return (Math.random() * 100<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">)=
.toFixed(2);
            }
            return null;
        }

        // =D0=9E=D0=B1=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=
=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD=D1=8B =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B8 =D1=
=81=D0=BC=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B5 =D0=BA=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=
=B0
        function updatePrice(rowId)<=
/span> {
            const row =3D document.querySelector(`tr[data-id=3D"${rowId}"]`);
            const skinInput =3D row.cells[2].querySelector('input'<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">)=
;
            fetchPrice(skinInput.value, rowId);
        }

        // =D0=A1=D0=BE=D1=85=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=
=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D0=B2 LocalStorage
        function saveData() {
            const rows =3D document.querySelectorAll('#tableBody tr');
            drops =3D [];
           =20
            rows.forEach(row =3D> {
                drops.push({
                    account=
: row.cells[0].querySelector(=
'input').value,
                    case: row.cells[1].querySelector('input').value,
                    skin: row.cells[2].querySelector('in=
put').value,
                    wear: row.cells[3].querySelector('se=
lect').value,
                    price: row.cells[4].textContent,
                    date: row.cells[5].querySelector('in=
put').value
                });
            });
           =20
            localStorage.setItem('cs2drops',<=
/span> JSON.stringify(dro=
ps));
        }

        // =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=
=B7=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85
        function loadData() {
            drops.forEach(drop =3D> add=
Row(drop));
        }

        // =D0=9E=D0=B1=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=
=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=
=B8=D0=BA=D0=B8
        function updateSummary() {=

            const rows =3D document.querySelectorAll('#tableBody tr');
            let total =3D 0;
            let count =3D 0;
           =20
            rows.forEach(row =3D> {
                const priceText =3D row.<=
/span>cells[4].textContent;
                const price =3D parseFloat(priceText.('$', '').replace(' ', ''));
                if (!=
isNaN)) {
                    total +=3D price<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">;
                    count++;
                }
            });
           =20
            document.getElementById('totalDrops').textContent =3D count;
            document.getElementById('totalValue').textContent =3D '$' =
+ total.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('avgValue').textContent =3D '$' +<=
/span> (count ? (total/count).toFixed(2) : '0.00');
        }

        // =D0=AD=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D1=
=80=D1=82 =D0=B2 CSV
        function exportData() {
            let csv =3D '=D0=90=D0=BA=D0=BA=D0=
=B0=D1=83=D0=BD=D1=82,=D0=9A=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81,=D0=A1=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD,=D0=
=9A=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=BE,=D0=A6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0,=D0=
=94=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=B0\n';
            drops.forEach(drop =3D> =
{
                csv +=3D ${drop.account},${drop.case},${dro=
p.skin,=
${drop.wear},${drop.price},${drop.date}\n`=
;
            });
           =20
            const blob =3D new Blob([csv], { =
type: 'text/csv;charset=3Dutf-8;' }=
);
            const link =3D document.createElement'a');
            link.href =3D =
URL=
.createObjectU=
RL(blob);
            link.download =3D 'cs2_drops_' + new Date().toISOString(.split'T')[0] + '.csv';
            link.click();
        }

        // =D0=9E=D1=87=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=
=BA=D0=B0 =D0=B2=D1=81=D0=B5=D1=85 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85
        function clearAll() {
            if (confirm('=
=D0=A3=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BB=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=B2=D1=81=D0=B5 =D0=B7=D0=B0=
=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=B8?')=
) localStorage.removeItem(=
'cs2drops');
                document.getElementById(=
'tableBody').innerHTML =3D ''=
;
                updateSummary();
            }
        }

        // =D0=A4=D0=B8=D0=BB=D1=8C=D1=82=D1=
=80=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8F =D0=BA=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2 (=D0=B4=D0=
=BE=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=BB=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=8F=
 =D0=BB=D0=BE=D0=B3=D0=B8=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=BD=D1=83=
=D0=B6=D0=BD=D0=B0)
        function filterCases(input)<=
/span> {
            // =D0=9C=D0=BE=D0=B6=D0=BD=D0=BE=
 =D0=B4=D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=B4=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=B0=
=D0=BC=D0=B8=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BA=D1=83=D1=8E =D1=84=D0=B8=D0=BB=D1=8C=
=D1=82=D1=80=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8E =D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D1=81=D1=82=
=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B4=D0=B0=D1=80=D1=82=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B3=D0=BE datalist =D0=
=BD=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=BE=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=BE=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=BE
        }

        // =D0=98=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=86=D0=B8=D0=
=B0=D0=BB=D0=B8=D0=B7=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8F
        initDatalists();
        if (drops.=
length =3D=3D=3D 0) {
            addRow(); // =D0=9F=D0=
=B5=D1=80=D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=8F =D0=BF=D1=83=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=8F =D1=81=D1=
=82=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B0
        } else {
            loadData();
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
      =D0=9A=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87=D0=B5=D0=B2=D1=8B=D0=B5= =D1=84=D0=B8=D1=87=D0=B8:
      1. =D0=90=D0=B2=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=BE=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=BB= =D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5: =D0=9F=D1=80=D0=B8 =D0=B2=D0=B2=D0= =BE=D0=B4=D0=B5 "rev" =D0=B2 =D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=BB=D0=BE=D0=BD=D0=BA=D0=B5 =D0= =BA=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=B0 =E2=80=94 =D0=B2=D1=8B=D0=BF=D0=B0=D0=B4=D0=B0= =D0=B5=D1=82 =D1=81=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=BA =D1=81 Revolution Case = =D0=B8 =D0=B4=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B3=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B8 =D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=BF= =D0=B0=D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8F=D0=BC=D0=B8 (=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B5= =D0=B7 HTML5 datalist)
      2.     =D0=A2=D0=B5=D0=BF=D0=B5=D1=80=D1=8C =D0=BC=D0= =BD=D0=B5 =D0=BD=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=BD=D0=BE =D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B7=D0=B4=D0=B0=D1= =82=D1=8C =D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0= =B9 HTML =D1=84=D0=B0=D0=B9=D0=BB =D1=81:
    1. =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=B9 =D0= =B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D1=8B =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2 =D0=B8=D0=B7 JSO= N ByMykel (=D0=BD=D0=B0 =D1=80=D1=83=D1=81=D1=81=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=BC =D1=8F= =D0=B7=D1=8B=D0=BA=D0=B5)
    2. =D0=A1=D0= =B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B5=D0=BC=D0=BE=D0=B9 =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B8=D1=80=D0= =BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8F =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD =D0=B2 LocalStorage (= =D1=87=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B1=D1=8B =D0=BD=D0=B5 =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B0= =D1=88=D0=B8=D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B2=D1=82=D0=BE=D1=80= =D0=BD=D0=BE =D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=BD=D0=B8 =D0=B8 =D1=82=D0=B5 =D0=B6=D0=B5 =D1= =81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D1=8B)
    3. Fuzzy s= earch =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F =D0=B0=D0=B2=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=BE=D0=BF=D0=BE= =D0=BB=D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8F (=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BA =D0=BF= =D0=BE =D1=87=D0=B0=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=BC=D1=83 =D1=81= =D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=BF=D0=B0=D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8E)
    4. =D0=9E=D0=BF=D1=82=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B8=D0=B7=D0=B0=D1=86= =D0=B8=D0=B5=D0=B9 API =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2 (de= bounce + =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88)
    =D0=A1= =D1=82=D1=80=D1=83=D0=BA=D1=82=D1=83=D1=80=D0=B0 =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B0:<= /div>
    • priceCache - = =D0=BE=D0=B1=D1=8A=D0=B5=D0=BA=D1=82 =D1=81 =D0=BA=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87=D0=BE= =D0=BC skinName_wear =D0=B8 =D0=B7=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B5=D0=BD= =D0=B8=D0=B5=D0=BC {price, timestamp}
    • =D0=92=D1=80=D0=B5=D0=BC=D1=8F =D0=B6=D0=B8=D0=B7=D0=BD=D0=B8 = =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B0 - =D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B5=D1=80= , 24 =D1=87=D0=B0=D1=81=D0=B0 (=D0=B8=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=81=D1=82= =D1=80=D0=B0=D0=B8=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=B5=D0=BC=D0=BE=D0=B5)
    • =D0=9F=D1=80=D0=B8 =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D1=81= =D0=B5 =D1=81=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B0=D0=BB=D0=B0 =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2= =D0=B5=D1=80=D1=8F=D0=B5=D0=BC =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88, =D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BB=D0=B8= =D0=BD=D0=B5=D1=82 =D0=B8=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D1=83=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=80=D0=B5= =D0=BB - =D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BB=D0=B0=D0=B5=D0=BC API =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80= =D0=BE=D1=81
    =D0=94=D0=BE=D0=BF=D0= =BE=D0=BB=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B5 =D1=83=D0= =BB=D1=83=D1=87=D1=88=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8F:
    • =D0=98=D0=BD=D0=B4=D0=B8=D0=BA=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=BE=D1= =80 =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=BA=D0=B8 =D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D1= =8B =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2
  • =D0=9E=D1=84=D1=84=D0=BB=D0=B0=D0=B9=D0=BD =D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B6=D0=B8=D0= =BC (=D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=B0 =D1=83=D0=B6=D0=B5 = =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0)
  • =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BA =D1=81 =D1=83=D1=87=D0= =B5=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=BC market_hash_name (=D1=82=D0=BE=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0= =B5 =D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F API= )
  • =D0=92=D0=B8=D0=B7=D1=83=D0=B0=D0= =BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=8F =D0=BE=D0=B1=D1=80=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1= =8F =D1=81=D0=B2=D1=8F=D0=B7=D1=8C =D0=BE =D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=82=D1=83=D1= =81=D0=B5 =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B0
    • = =D0=94=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=B9=D1=82=D0=B5 =D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=88= =D0=B5=D0=BC =D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=B4.
    =
    <= div class=3D"paragraph">=D0=92=D0=BE=D1=82 =D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2= =D0=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=8F =D0=B2=D0=B5=D1=80=D1=81=D0=B8=D1=8F = =D1=81 =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=BB=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B9 =D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0= =BE=D0=B9 =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2 (1500+ =D0=BF=D1=80= =D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=BC=D0=B5=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B2) =D0=B8=D0=B7 =D1=80=D0=B5=D0=BF= =D0=BE=D0=B7=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=BE=D1=80=D0=B8=D1=8F ByMykel
    =D0=B8 =D1=83=D0=BC=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=BC =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88= =D0=B8=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5=D0=BC =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD:
    HTML
    Preview
    = Copy
    <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang=3D"ru">
<head>
    <meta chars=
et=3D"UTF-8">
    <meta name<=
/span>=3D"viewport" =3D"wid=
th=3Ddevice-width, initial-scale=3D1.0">
    <title>=
;CS2 Drop Tracker Pro</title>
    <style>=
;
        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        body {=20
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;=20
            background: linear-gradient<=
/span>(deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213=
e 100=
%);=20
            color: #eee;=20
            padding: 20px;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        .contain=
er { max-width: =
1600px; =
margin: 0 auto; }
        h1 {=20
            color: #ff6b6b;=20
            margin-bottom: 10px;=
=20
            text-align: center;
            text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, <=
span class=3D"token number">107, 107, 0.3);
        }
       =20
        .status-=
bar {
            background: #0f3460;
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
       =20
        .status-=
indicator {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }
       =20
        .dot {
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #4ecca3;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;<=
/span>
        }
       =20
        .dot.offline { background: #=
ff6b6b; animation: none=
; @keyframes<=
/span> pulse {
            0%, 100% { opacity: 1}
            50% { opacity: 0.5<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">; }
        }
       =20
        .control=
s {=20
            background: rgba(15, 52, 96,=
 0.8);=20
            padding: 20px;=20
            border-radius: 12px;=
=20
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            align-items: center;
            backdrop-filter: blur=
(10px=
);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }
       =20
        input, select, button =
{
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border: 1px solid #0f3460;
            background: #1a1a2e;
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 14px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }
       =20
        input:focus, select:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #e94560=
;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(233, 69, 96, 0.1);
        }
       =20
        button {
            background: linear-gradient<=
/span>(deg, #e94560 0%, #ff6b6=
b 100=
%);
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(233, 69, 96, =
0.3);
        }
       =20
        button:hover {=20
            transform: translateY=
(-2px=
);
            box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(233, 69, 96, =
0.4);
        }
       =20
        button.s=
econdary {
            background: #0f3460;
            box-shadow: none;
        }
       =20
        button.s=
econdary:hover {
            background: #1a4a7a;
        }
       =20
        .api-key=
-input { flex: <=
span class=3D"token number">1; min-width: 300px; }
       =20
        .table-c=
ontainer {
            overflow-x: auto;
            background: rgba(22, 33, 62,=
 0.8);
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            backdrop-filter: blur=
(10px=
);
        }
       =20
        table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse=
;
        }
       =20
        th=
, td {
            padding: 14px;
            text-align: left;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(<=
span class=3D"token number">255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        }
       =20
        th {=20
            background: rgba(15, 52, 96,=
 0.9);=20
            color: #ff6b6b;=20
            font-weight: 600;
            position: sticky;
            top: 0;
            backdrop-filter: blur=
(10px=
);
        }
       =20
        tr:hover { background: rgba(255=
, 255, 255, 0.03); }
       =20
        .editabl=
e {
            background: transparent<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">;
            border: 1px solid transparent=
;
            color: #fff;
            width: 100%;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 14px;
        }
       =20
        .editabl=
e:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #e94560=
;
            background: rgba(26, 26, 46,=
 0.8);
        }
       =20
        .price-c=
ell {=20
            color: #4ecca3;=20
            font-weight: 700;=20
            min-width: 100px;
            font-size: 15px;
        }
       =20
        .price-c=
ell.cached {
            color: #5e98d9;
            position: relative;
        }
       =20
        .price-c=
ell.cached::after {
            content: '=E2=97=8F';
            font-size: 8px;
            margin-left: 5px;
            color: #5e98d9;
            vertical-align: super;
        }
       =20
        .total-r=
ow {
            background: rgba(15, 52, 96,=
 0.9) !important;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 1.1em;
        }
       =20
        .autocom=
plete-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ions {
            position: absolute;
            top: calc(100% + 5px);
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: #1a1a2e;
            border: 1px solid #e94560;
            border-radius: 8px;
            max-height: 300px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            z-index: 1000;
            display: none;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0=
, 0.5=
);
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ion-item {
            padding: 10px 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(<=
span class=3D"token number">255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ion-item:hover {
            background: rgba(233, 69, 96=
, 0.2);
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ion-item.selected {
            background: rgba(233, 69, 96=
, 0.3);
        }
       =20
        .suggest=
ion-name { font-weight:=
 500; }
        .suggest=
ion-meta {=20
            font-size: 12px;=20
            color: #888;
            margin-left: 10px;
        }
       =20
        .loading=
 { color: #ffd93d; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }<=
/span>
        .error { color: #ff6b6b; }
       =20
        .spinner=
 {
            width: 16px;
            height: 16px;
            border: 2px solid #ffd93d;
            border-top-color: transparent;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
        }
       =20
        @keyframes<=
/span> spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
       =20
        .actions=
 {
            display: flex;
            gap: 10px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
       =20
        .summary=
 {
            background: rgba(22, 33, 62,=
 0.8);
            padding: 24px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            margin-top: 20px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repea=
t(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            backdrop-filter: blur=
(10px=
);
        }
       =20
        .stat-bo=
x {
            background: rgba(15, 52, 96,=
 0.6);
            padding: 20px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            text-align: center;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }
       =20
        .stat-bo=
x:hover {
            transform: translateY=
(-5px=
);
            background: rgba(15, 52, 96,=
 0.8);
        }
       =20
        .stat-va=
lue {
            font-size: 28px;
            color: #4ecca3;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
        }
       =20
        .stat-la=
bel { color: #aaa; font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing1=
px; }
       =20
        .cache-i=
nfo {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #666;
            margin-top: 10px;
            font-style: italic;
        }
       =20
        .delete-=
btn {
            background: #ff4444;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            font-size: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
        }
       =20
        .wear-se=
lect {
            background: #1a1a2e;
            border: 1px solid transparent=
;
            color: #fff;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            width: 100%;
        }
       =20
        .wear-se=
lect:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #e94560=
;
        }
       =20
        .notific=
ation {
            position: fixed;
            top: 20px;
            right: 20px;
            background: #4ecca3;
            color: #000;
            padding: 16px 24px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0=
, 0.3=
);
            display: none;
            animation: slideIn 0.3<=
span class=3D"token unit">s ease;<=
/span>
            font-weight: 600;
            z-index: 2000;
        }
       =20
        @keyframes<=
/span> slideIn {
            from { transform: transl=
ateX(400px); opacity: 0;<=
/span> }
            to { transform: translat=
eX(0); opacity: 1; =
}
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class<=
/span>=3D"container">
        <h1&g=
t;=F0=9F=8E=AF CS2 Drop Tracker Pro=
</h1<=
/span>>
       =20
        <div cl=
ass=3D"status-ba=
r">
            <div =3D"statu=
s-indicator">
                <div class=3D"d=
ot" id=3D"d=
bStatus"></div>
                <span id=3D"dbS=
tatusText">=D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=
=BA=D0=B0 =D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D1=8B =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2...<=
span class=3D"token tag"></span>
            </div>
            <div>
                <span style=3D"color: #666;">=D0=
=9A=D1=8D=D1=88 =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD: </span>
                <span id=3D"cac=
heCount">0</span> =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=
=BC=D0=B5=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B2
                <button onclick=3D"clearPriceCache(" <=
span class=3D"token attr-name">class=3D"secondary"=
 =
style=3D"margin=
-left: 10px; padding: 4px 8px; =
font-size: 12px;">=D0=9E=D1=87=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=
=BA=D1=8D=D1=88</button>
            </div>
        </div=
>

        <div cl=
ass=3D"controls<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">">
            <input type=3D"text=
" id=3D"api=
Key" class=3D"api-key-input" placeholder<=
span class=3D"token punctuation attr-equals">=3D"API =D0=BA=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87 (CSPriceAPI/CSMarketAPI)=
 - =D0=BE=D0=BF=D1=86=D0=B8=D0=BE=D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D0=BE"<select id=3D"apiPr=
ovider">
                <option value=3D"csprice">CSPriceAPI</option<=
/span>>
                <option value=3D"csmarket">CSMarketAPI</optio=
n>
                <option value=3D"steam">Steam (proxy)</option=
>
            </select>
            <button onclick=3D"addRow()">+ =D0=94=D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=
=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=B4=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BF</button>
            <button onclick=3D"exportData()" class=3D"secondary">=F0=9F=93=A5 CSV>
            <button onclick=3D"exportJSON()" class=3D"secondary">=F0=9F=93=84 JSON</button>
            <button onclick=3D"clearAll()<=
/span>" class=3D"secondary" style=3D"background: #ff4444;">=F0=9F=97=91 =D0=9E=D1=87=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B8=
=D1=82=D1=8C</button>
        </div=
>

        <div cl=
ass=3D"table-con=
tainer">
            <table id=3D"dropsT=
able">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th style=3D<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">"width: 15%;">=D0=90=D0=BA=D0=BA=D0=B0=D1=83=D0=BD=D1=82</th>
                        <th style=3D<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">"width: 20%;">=D0=9A=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81</t=
h>
                        <th style=3D<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">"width: 25%;">=D0=A1=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD</t=
h>
                        <th style=3D<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">"width: 12%;">=D0=9A=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=BE=
</th>
                        <th style=3D<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">"width: 13%;">=D0=A6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0</t=
h>
                        <th style=3D<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">"width: 10%;">=D0=94=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=B0</t=
h>
                        <th style=3D<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">"width: 5%;"></th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id=3D"ta=
bleBody"></tbody>
            </table>
        </div=
>

        <div cl=
ass=3D"summary">
            <div =3D"stat-=
box">
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-value" id=3D"<=
/span>totalDrops">0</div>
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-label">=D0=92=D1=81=D0=B5=D0=B3=D0=BE =D0=B4=D1=
=80=D0=BE=D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B2</div>
            </div>
            <div =3D"stat-=
box">
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-value" id=3D"<=
/span>totalValue">$0.00</div>
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-label">=D0=9E=D0=B1=D1=89=D0=B0=D1=8F =D1=81=D1=
=82=D0=BE=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=BE=D1=81=D1=82=D1=8C</div>
            </div>
            <div =3D"stat-=
box">
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-value" id=3D"<=
/span>avgValue">$0.00</div>
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-label">=D0=A1=D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=
=B9 =D0=B4=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BF</div>
            </div>
            <div =3D"stat-=
box">
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-value" id=3D"<=
/span>uniqueSkins">0</div>
                <div class=3D"s=
tat-label">=D0=A3=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=BA=D0=B0=D0=BB=D1=
=8C=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85 =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2</<=
/span>div>
            </div>
        </div=
>
       =20
        <div cl=
ass=3D"cache-inf=
o">
            * =D0=A6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D1=8B =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B8=D1=80=D1=83=
=D1=8E=D1=82=D1=81=D1=8F =D0=BD=D0=B0 24 =D1=87=D0=B0=D1=81=D0=B0 =D0=B4=D0=
=BB=D1=8F =D1=8D=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=BC=D0=B8=D0=B8 API-=D0=BB=D0=B8=
=D0=BC=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=B2. =D0=97=D0=B5=D0=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=8F =
=D1=82=D0=BE=D1=87=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=BE=D0=B7=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B0=D0=B5=
=D1=82 =D1=81=D0=B2=D0=B5=D0=B6=D1=83=D1=8E =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD=D1=83, =D1=
=81=D0=B8=D0=BD=D1=8F=D1=8F =E2=80=94 =D0=B8=D0=B7 =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B0=
.
        </div=
>
    </div>=


    <div class<=
/span>=3D"notification<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">" id=3D"noti=
fication"></div>

    <script&g=
t;
        // =D0=93=D0=BB=D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=
=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B5 =D0=BF=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B5=D0=BC=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=
=BD=D1=8B=D0=B5
        let skinsDB =3D [];
        let casesDB =3D [];
        let drops =3D JSO=
N.parse=
(localStorage.getItem('cs2drops') || =
'[]');
        let priceCache =3D .parse(localStorage.getItem('cs2priceCache') || '{}');
        const CACHE_TTL =3D 24 * 60 * <=
span class=3D"token number">60 * 1000// 24 =D1=87=D0=B0=D1=81=D0=B0
       =20
        // =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=
=B7=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D1=8B =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=
=85 =D0=B8=D0=B7 GitHub
        async function loadDatabase()<=
/span> {
            try {
                // =D0=9E=D1=81=D0=BD=D0=BE=
=D0=B2=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B9 =D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=BE=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=BA: =
ByMykel CSGO-API
                const [skinsRes, casesRes] =3D await=
 Promise.all([
                    fetch('https://raw.gi=
thubusercontent.com/ByMykel/CSGO-API/main/public/api/ru/skins_not_grouped.j=
son'),
                    fetch('https://raw.gi=
thubusercontent.com/ByMykel/CSGO-API/main/public/api/ru/crates.json'=
)
                ]);
               =20
                if (!=
skinsRes.ok || !casesRes.ok) throw <=
span class=3D"token keyword">new Er=
ror('Failed to fetch');
               =20
                const skinsData =3D await skinsRes.json();
                const casesData =3D await casesRes.json();
               =20
                // =D0=9E=D0=B1=D1=80=D0=B0=
=D0=B1=D0=BE=D1=82=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2
                skinsDB =3D skinsData=
.map(skin =3D> ({
                    name: skin.name,
                    weapon<=
/span>: skin.weapon?.name || '',
                    pattern=
: skin.pattern?.name || '',
                    rarity<=
/span>: skin.rarity?.name || '',
                    rarityC=
olor: skin.rarity?.color =
|| '',
                    wear: skin.wear?.name || =
'Factory New',
                    image: skin.image,
                    market_=
hash_name: skin.market_has=
h_name,
                    stattra=
k: skin.stattrak,
                    souveni=
r: skin.souvenir,
                    searchT=
erms: generateSearchTerms(=
skin.name, skin.wea=
pon?.name, skin.pattern?.name)
                }));
               =20
                // =D0=9E=D0=B1=D1=80=D0=B0=
=D0=B1=D0=BE=D1=82=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=BA=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2
                casesDB =3D casesData
                    .filter(item =3D> item.type =3D=3D=3D 'Case' || item.market_hash_name?.includes('Case'))
                    .map(item =3D> =
({
                        nam=
e: item.name,
                        mar=
ket_hash_name: item.market=
_hash_name,
                        ima=
ge: item.image
                    }));
               =20
                document.getElementById(=
'dbStatus').classList.remove('offline');
                document.getElementById(=
'dbStatusText').textContent =3D=
 `=D0=91=D0=B0=D0=
=B7=D0=B0 =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0: ${skinsDB.length} =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2, $=
{casesDB.length} =D0=BA=D0=B5=
=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2`;
               =20
                // =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=
=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D1=81=D0=BE=D1=85=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=
=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85
                if (drops=
.length > 0) {
                    drops.forEach(drop =3D> addRow(drop));
                } else {<=
/span>
                    addRow(); // =
=D0=9F=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B2=D0=B0=D1=8F =D0=BF=D1=83=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=8F =
=D1=81=D1=82=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B0
                }
               =20
                updateCacheCounter()<=
/span>;
               =20
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error loading DB:', error);
                document.getElementById(=
'dbStatus').classList.add('offline');
                document.getElementById(=
'dbStatusText').textContent =3D=
 '=D0=9E=D1=84=D0=BB=D0=B0=D0=B9=D0=BD =
=D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B6=D0=B8=D0=BC (=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=B0 =D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=B4=
=D0=BE=D1=81=D1=82=D1=83=D0=BF=D0=BD=D0=B0)';
               =20
                // Fallback =D0=BD=D0=B0 =D0=
=BC=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B0=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=BD=D1=83=D1=8E =D0=B1=D0=
=B0=D0=B7=D1=83
                skinsDB =3D []=
;
                casesDB =3D [
                    {name: "Revolution Case"},
                    {name: "Kilowatt Case"},
                    {name: "Anubis Collection Package"}
                ];
                addRow();
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=93=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=
=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8F =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=B2=D1=8B=D1=
=85 =D1=82=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=BC=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2 =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F fuz=
zy search
        function generateSearchTerms(name,<=
/span> weapon, pattern) {
            const terms =3D [name<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">]=
;
            if (weapon) terms.push, `${weapon} ${pattern}`, `${weapon} | ${pattern}`);
            if (pattern)<=
/span> terms.push(pattern);
            return terms<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">.join(' ').toLowerCase);
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=
=B0=D1=82=D1=8C =D1=83=D0=B2=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=BE=D0=BC=D0=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=
=B8=D0=B5
        function showNotification(=
text, type =3D 'success') {
            const notif =3D document.getElementById('notification');
            notif.textContent =3D=
 text;
            notif.style.background =3D type =3D=3D=3D 'error' '#ff6b6b' : '#4ecca3';
            notif.style.color =3D type =3D=3D=3D 'error' ? '#fff' : '#000';
            notif.style.display =3D 'block';
            setTimeout(() =
=3D> notif.style.<=
/span>display =3D 'none', 3000)}
       =20
        // =D0=94=D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=
=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=81=D1=82=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B8
        function addRow(data =3D null) {
            const tbody =3D document.getElementById('tableBody');
            const row =3D document.createElement('tr');
            const id =3D =
Date.now().toS=
tring(36) + =
Math.random().=
toString(36).substr(2);
           =20
            row.innerHTML =3D `
                <td><input type=3D"text" class=3D"editable" placeh=
older=3D"Steam =D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=BA" value=3D"${data?.account || ''}" onchang=
e=3D"saveData()"></td>
                <td>
                    <div class=3D"autocomplete-wrapper">
                        <input type=3D"text" class=3D"editable" id=3D"ca=
se-${id}" placeholder=3D"=D0=9D=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=82=D0=B5 =D0=B2=
=D0=B2=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C..."=20
                               value=3D"${data?.case || ''}" oninput=3D"sea=
rchCases(this, '${id}')" onblur=3D"hideSuggestionsDelayed('case-suggestions=
-${id}')">
                        <div class=3D"suggestions" id=3D"case-suggestion=
s-${id}"></div>
                    </div>
                </td>
                <td>
                    <div class=3D"autocomplete-wrapper">
                        <input type=3D"text" class=3D"editable" id=3D"sk=
in-${id}" placeholder=3D"AK-47, AWP..."=20
                               value=3D"${data?.skin || ''}" oninput=3D"sea=
rchSkins(this, '${id}')" onblur=3D"hideSuggestionsDelayed('skin-suggestions=
-${id}')" onfocus=3D"restoreSkinSearch('${id}')">
                        <div class=3D"suggestions" id=3D"skin-suggestion=
s-${id}"></div>
                    </div>
                </td>
                <td>
                    <select class=3D"wear-select" id=3D"wear-${id}" onch=
ange=3D"updatePrice('${id}'); saveData()">
                        <option value=3D"Factory New" ${data?.wear =3D=
=3D=3D 'Factory New' ? 'selected' : ''}>Factory New</option>
                        <option value=3D"Minimal Wear" ${data?.wear =3D=
=3D=3D 'Minimal Wear' ? 'selected' : ''}>Minimal Wear</option>
                        <option value=3D"Field-Tested" ${data?.wear =3D=
=3D=3D 'Field-Tested' ? 'selected' : ''}>Field-Tested</option>
                        <option value=3D"Well-Worn" ${data?.wear =3D=3D=
=3D 'Well-Worn' ? 'selected' : ''}>Well-Worn</option>
                        <option value=3D"Battle-Scarred" ${data?.wear =
=3D=3D=3D 'Battle-Scarred' ? 'selected' : ''}>Battle-Scarred</option&=
gt;
                    </select>
                </td>
                <td class=3D"price-cell ${data?.cached ? 'cached' : ''}"=
 id=3D"price-${id}">${data?.price || '-'}</td>
                <td><input type=3D"date" class=3D"editable" value=
=3D"${data?.date || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}" onchange=3D"sa=
veData()"></td>
                <td><button class=3D"delete-btn" onclick=3D"delete=
Row(this)">=E2=9C=95</button></td>
            `;
           =20
            row.dataset.id =3D id;
            row.dataset.marketHash =3D data?.marketH=
ash || '=
';
            tbody.appendChild(row);
            updateSummary();
           =20
            // =D0=95=D1=81=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=
=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B5 =D0=B8 =D1=86=D0=
=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0, =D0=BD=D0=BE =D0=BD=D0=B5=D1=82 marketHash, =D0=BF=D0=BE=
=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B1=D1=83=D0=B5=D0=BC =D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=B9=D1=82=D0=B8
            if (data?.skin && !data?.marketHash) =
{
                findMarketHash(id, data.skin, data.|| 'Factory New');
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BA =D0=
=BA=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2
        function searchCases(input, =
id) {
            const query =3D input.=
value.toLo=
werCase();
            const suggestionsDiv =3D doc=
ument.getElementById(`case=
-suggestions-${id}`);
           =20
            if (query.length < 1) {
                suggestionsDiv.style.display =3D 'none';
                return;
            }
           =20
            const matches =3D casesDB.filter(c =3D>=20
                c.name.=
toLowerCase()<=
/span>.includes(query) ||=20
                c.market_hash_name?.toLowerCase=
().includes(query)
            ).=
slice(0, 10);
           =20
            if (matches.<=
/span>length =3D=3D=3D 0) {
                suggestionsDiv.style.display =3D 'none';
                return;
            }
           =20
            suggestionsDiv.innerHTML =3D matches.map(c =3D> `
                <div class=3D"suggestion-item" onclick=3D"selectCase('${id}', '${c.=
name.repla=
ce(/'/g, "\\'")}')">
                    <span class=3D"suggestion-name">${highlightMatch(c.=
name, query)}</span>
                </div>
            `).joi=
n('');
           =20
            suggestionsDiv.styledisplay =3D 'block'<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">;
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BA =D1=
=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2
        let currentSkinResults =3D {};
       =20
        function searchSkins(input, =
id) {
            const query =3D input.=
value.toLo=
werCase();
            const suggestionsDiv =3D doc=
ument.getElementById(`skin=
-suggestions-${id}`);
           =20
            if (query.length < 2) {
                suggestionsDiv.style.display =3D 'none';
                return;
            }
           =20
            // Fuzzy search
            const matches =3D skinsDB.filter(s =3D>=20
                s.searchTerms.=
includes(query) ||
                s.name.=
toLowerCase()<=
/span>.includes(query) ||
                s.weapon.toLowerCase<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">(=
).includes(query) ||
                s.pattern.toLowerCase=
().includes(query)
            ).=
slice(0, 15);
           =20
            currentSkinResults[id<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">] =
=3D matches;
           =20
            if (matches.<=
/span>length =3D=3D=3D 0) {
                suggestionsDiv.style.display =3D 'none';
                return;
            }
           =20
            suggestionsDiv.innerHTML =3D matches.map((s, idx=
) =3D> `
                <div class=3D"suggestion-item =3D=3D=3D 0 ? 'selected' : ''}"=20
                     onclick=3D"selectSkin('${<=
/span>id}', ${idx})"
                     data-idx=3D"${idx}">
                    <div>
                        <span class=3D"suggestion-name">${highlightMatch(s.name, query)=
}=
</span>
                        <span class=3D"suggestion-meta">${s.rarity}<=
;/span>
                    </div>
                    ${s.stattrak ? '=
<span style=3D"color: #ff6b6b; font-size: 11px;">ST</span>' : ''=
}=

                </div>
            `).joi=
n('');
           =20
            suggestionsDiv.styledisplay =3D 'block'<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">;
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=B4=D1=81=D0=B2=D0=
=B5=D1=82=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=BF=D0=B0=D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=
=B8=D0=B9
        function highlightMatch(text, query) {
            const regex =3D new RegExp(=
`(${query})`, 'gi');
            return text.replace(=
regex, );
        }
       =20
        // =D0=92=D1=8B=D0=B1=D0=BE=D1=80 =D0=
=BA=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=B0
        function selectCase(id, name=
) {
            const input =3D document.getElementById(`case-<=
span class=3D"token interpolation">${id}`);
            input.value =3D name;
            document.getElementById(`case-suggestions-${id}`).style.display =3D 'none';
            saveData();
        }
       =20
        // =D0=92=D1=8B=D0=B1=D0=BE=D1=80 =D1=
=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=B0
        function selectSkin(id, idx<=
/span>) {
            const skin =3D currentSkinResults[id][idx];
            if (!skin=
) return;
           =20
            const input =3D document.getElementById(`skin-<=
span class=3D"token interpolation">${id}`);
            const row =3D input.closest('tr');=

           =20
            input.value =3D skin.name;
            row.dataset.marketHash =3D skin.market_hash_name;
            row.dataset.skinData =3D JSO=
N.stringify(skin);
           =20
            document.getElementById(`skin-suggestions-${id}`).style.display =3D 'none';
           =20
            // =D0=90=D0=B2=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=BF=
=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=B1=D0=BE=D1=80 =D0=BA=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B2=
=D0=B0 =D0=B5=D1=81=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D1=8C
            if (skin.wear && skin.wear !=3D=3D 'Factory New') {
                const wearSelect =3D doc=
ument.getElementById(`wear=
-${id}`);
                const options =3D Array.from(wearSelect.options)=
;
                const match =3D options.<=
/span>find(o =3D> o.value =
=3D=3D=3D skin.wear);
                if (match=
) wearSelect.value =3D skin.wear;
            }
           =20
            saveData();
            updatePrice(id);
        }
       =20
        // =D0=A1=D0=BA=D1=80=D1=8B=D1=82=D0=
=B8=D0=B5 =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B4=D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=BE=D0=BA =D1=81 =D0=
=B7=D0=B0=D0=B4=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B6=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=B9 (=D1=87=D1=82=D0=BE=D0=
=B1=D1=8B =D1=83=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=B5=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=BA=D0=BB=D0=B8=D0=BA=D0=
=BD=D1=83=D1=82=D1=8C)
        function hideSuggestionsDelayed(<=
/span>id) {
            setTimeout(() =
=3D> {
                const el =3D document<=
/span>.getElementById(id);
                if (el) el.style.display =3D 'none';
            }, 200);
        }
       =20
        // =D0=92=D0=BE=D1=81=D1=81=D1=82=D0=
=B0=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=
=81=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=B0 =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=B8 =D1=84=D0=
=BE=D0=BA=D1=83=D1=81=D0=B5
        function restoreSkinSearch(id) {
            const input =3D document.getElementById(`skin-<=
span class=3D"token interpolation">${id}`);
            if (input.value.length >=3D 2<=
/span>) {
                searchSkins(input, id);
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BA mar=
ket_hash_name =D0=BF=D0=BE =D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8 (=D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=
=8F =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85 =D0=
=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85)
        function findMarketHash(id, =
skinName, wear) {
            const match =3D skinsDB.find(s =
=3D>=20
                s.name =3D=3D=3D<=
/span> skinName ||=20
                s.name =3D=3D=3D<=
/span> `${skinName} (${wear})`
            );
            if (match) {
                const row =3D document<=
/span>.querySelector(`tr[data-id=
=3D"${id}"]<=
/span>`);
                if (row)<=
/span> {
                    row.dataset.marketHash =3D match.market_hash_name;
                    updatePrice(id);
                }
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9A=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B8=D1=80=D0=
=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD
        function getCachedPrice(marketHash) {
            if (!mark=
etHash) return null<=
/span>;
            const cached =3D priceCache=
[marketHash];
            if (!cach=
ed) return null;
           =20
            // =D0=9F=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B5=
=D1=80=D0=BA=D0=B0 TTL
            if (Date.now() - cached.timestamp > CACHE_TTL) {
                delete priceCache[marketHash];
                localStorage.setItem('cs2priceCache', JSON.stringify(<=
/span>priceCache));
                return null;
            }
           =20
            return cached=
.price;
        }
       =20
        function setCachedPrice(marketHash,=
 price) {
            if (!mark=
etHash) return;
            priceCache[marketHash<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">] =
=3D {
                price: price,
                timestamp: Date.now()
            };
            localStorage.setItem('cs2priceCache', JSON.stringify(priceCache));
            updateCacheCounter();
        }
       =20
        function updateCacheCounter() {
            document.getElementById('cacheCount').textContent =3D Object.keys(priceCach=
e)length;
        }
       =20
        function clearPriceCache(<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">) {
            if (confirm('=
=D0=9E=D1=87=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88 =D1=86=
=D0=B5=D0=BD?')) {
                priceCache =3D {};
                localStorage.removeItem(=
'cs2priceCache');
                updateCacheCounter()<=
/span>;
                showNotification('=D0=9A=
=D1=8D=D1=88 =D0=BE=D1=87=D0=B8=D1=89=D0=B5=D0=BD');
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9E=D0=B1=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=
=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=86=D0=B5=D0=BD=D1=8B =D1=81 =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=
=88=D0=B8=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5=D0=BC
        let debounceTimer;
        async function updatePrice(id) {
            clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
            debounceTimer =3D setTimeout=
(() =3D> {
                fetchPriceInternal(id=
);
            }, 500);
        }
       =20
        async function fetchPriceInternal() {
            const row =3D document.querySelector(`tr[data-id=3D"${id}"]=
`);
            if (!row<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">) return;
           =20
            const marketHash =3D row.dataset.marketHash;
            const wear =3D document.getElementById(`wear-${id}`).value<=
/span>;
            const priceCell =3D document=
.getElementById(`price-${id}`);
           =20
            if (!mark=
etHash) {
                // =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=BF=D1=80=
=D0=BE=D0=B1=D1=83=D0=B5=D0=BC =D0=BD=D0=B0=D0=B9=D1=82=D0=B8 =D0=BF=D0=BE =
=D0=B8=D0=BC=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8
                const skinName =3D docum=
ent.getElementById(`skin-<=
/span>${id}`).=
value;
                findMarketHash(id, skinName, wear);
                return;
            }
           =20
            // =D0=9F=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B5=
=D1=80=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B0
            const fullHash =3D `${=
marketHash_=
${wear}<=
/span>`;
            const cachedPrice =3D getCachedP=
rice(fullHash);
           =20
            if (cachedPrice =
!=3D=3D null) {
                priceCell.textContent =3D '$' + parseFloat(cachedPrice).toFixed(2);
                priceCell.classList.add('c=
ached');
                saveData();
                updateSummary();
                return;
            }
           =20
            // =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=
=D1=81 =D0=BA API
            priceCell.innerHTML =
=3D '<div class=3D"loading"><d=
iv class=3D"spinner"></div>=D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=
=BA=D0=B0...</div>';
            priceCell.classListremove('c=
ached');
           =20
            const price =3D awai=
t fetchFromAPI(marketHash, wear);
           =20
            if (price !=3D=
=3D null) {
                priceCell.textContent =3D '$' + parseFloat(price=
).toFixed2);
                setCachedPrice(fullHash);
                saveData();
                updateSummary();
            } else {
                priceCell.innerHTML =3D '<span class=3D"error">=D0=
=9D=D0=B5=D1=82 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85</span>';
            }
        }
       =20
        // API =D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=
=D1=81=D1=8B
        async function fetchFromAPI(mark=
etHash, wear) {
            const apiKey =3D document<=
/span>.getElementById('apiKey').valueconst provider =3D document<=
/span>.getElementById('apiProvider').value;
           =20
            // =D0=95=D1=81=D0=BB=D0=B8 =D0=
=BD=D0=B5=D1=82 API =D0=BA=D0=BB=D1=8E=D1=87=D0=B0, =D0=B8=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=
=BE=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=B7=D1=83=D0=B5=D0=BC =D1=84=D0=B5=D0=B9=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=
=B2=D1=8B=D0=B5 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B5 =D0=B4=D0=BB=D1=8F =D0=
=B4=D0=B5=D0=BC=D0=BE
            if (!apiK=
ey) {
                return (Math.random() * 50 <=
span class=3D"token operator">+ 0.5).toFixed(2);
            }
           =20
            try {
                let url;
                if (provider =3D=3D=3D 'csprice') {
                    url =3D `https://api.cspriceapi.com/v1/pric=
es?market_hash_name=3D${encodeURIComponent(=
marketHash)}&api_key=3D${apiKey}`;
                } else if (provider =3D=3D=3D 'csma=
rket') {
                    url =3D `https://api.csmarketapi.com/api/v1=
/prices?market_hash_name=3D${encodeURIComponent(marketHash)}&api_key=3D${apiKe=
y}`;
                } else {<=
/span>
                    // Steam =D1=87=D0=B5=D1=
=80=D0=B5=D0=B7 =D0=BF=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=B8 (=D0=BD=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=
=B5=D0=BD =D1=81=D0=B2=D0=BE=D0=B9 =D1=81=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B2=D0=B5=D1=80)
                    return null;
                }
               =20
                const response =3D await fetch(url);
                if (!=
response.ok) throw new Error('API Error');
               =20
                const data =3D a=
wait response.json();
               =20
                // =D0=9F=D0=B0=D1=80=D1=81=
=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=B3 =D0=BE=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=B5=D1=82=D0=B0 (=D0=B7=D0=B0=D0=B2=
=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=B8=D1=82 =D0=BE=D1=82 API)
                if (data.=
price || data.average_price || data.median_price) {
                    return data.price || data.a=
verage_price || data.media=
n_price;
                }
               =20
                return null;
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('API Error:', e);
                return null;
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=A3=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BB=D0=B5=D0=
=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=81=D1=82=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=BA=D0=B8
        function deleteRow(btn) {
            if (confirm('=
=D0=A3=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BB=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D1=8D=D1=82=D1=83 =D0=B7=D0=B0=
=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=8C?')=
) .closest('tr').remove();
                saveData();
                updateSummary();
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=A1=D0=BE=D1=85=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=
=BD=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85
        function saveData() {
            const rows =3D document.querySelectorAll('#tableBody tr');
            drops =3D [];
           =20
            rows.forEach(row =3D> {
                const id =3D row.dataset.id;
                const priceCell =3D row.<=
/span>cells[4];
                const isCached =3D priceCell.classList.contains('cached');
               =20
                drops.push({
                    account=
: row.cells[0].querySelector(=
'input').value,
                    case: row.cells[1].querySelector('input').value,
                    skin: row.cells[2].querySelector('in=
put').value,
                    wear: row.cells[3].querySelector('se=
lect').value,
                    price: priceCell.textContent,
                    marketH=
ash: row.dataset.,
                    date: row.cells[5].querySelector('in=
put').value,
                    cached<=
/span>: isCached
                });
            });
           =20
            localStorage.setItem('cs2drops',<=
/span> JSON.stringify(dro=
ps));
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9E=D0=B1=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=
=BB=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=81=D1=82=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=
=B8=D0=BA=D0=B8
        function updateSummary() {=

            const rows =3D document.querySelectorAll('#tableBody tr');
            let total =3D 0;
            let count =3D 0;
            const uniqueSkins =3D new =
Set);
           =20
            rows.forEach(row =3D> {
                const priceText =3D row.<=
/span>cells[4].textContent;
                const skinName =3D row.cells[2].querySelector('input').value;
               =20
                if (skinName) uniqueSkins.add(skinName);
               =20
                const price =3D parseFloat(priceText.(/[$\s]/=
g, ''));
                if (!=
isNaN) && price > 0{
                    total +=3D price<=
span class=3D"token punctuation">;
                    count++;
                }
            });
           =20
            document.getElementById('totalDrops').textContent =3D count;
            document.getElementById('totalValue').textContent =3D '$' =
+ total.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('avgValue').textContent =3D '$' +<=
/span> (count ? (total/count).toFixed(2) : '0.00');
            document.getElementById('uniqueSkins').textContent =3D uniqueSkins.size;
        }
       =20
        // =D0=AD=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D1=
=80=D1=82 CSV
        function exportData() {
            let csv =3D '=D0=90=D0=BA=D0=BA=D0=
=B0=D1=83=D0=BD=D1=82,=D0=9A=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81,=D0=A1=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD,=D0=
=9A=D0=B0=D1=87=D0=B5=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=BE,=D0=A6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B0,=D0=
=94=D0=B0=D1=82=D0=B0\n';
            drops.forEach(drop =3D> =
{
                csv +=3D "${drop.account}","${drop.case}","${drop.skin}","${drop.wear}","${drop.price=
}=
","${drop.date}"\n`;
            });
           =20
            downloadFile(csv, 'cs2_drops.csv', 'text/csv');
            showNotification('CSV =D1=8D=
=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D1=80=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD');
        }
       =20
        // =D0=AD=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D1=
=80=D1=82 JSON
        function exportJSON() {
            const data =3D {
                drops: drops,
                totalValue<=
/span>: document.getElementById('totalValue').textContent,
                exportDate<=
/span>: new Date().toISOString()
            };
            downloadFile(JSON.stringify(data, null2), 'cs2_drops.json', 'application/json');
            showNotification('JSON =D1=8D=
=D0=BA=D1=81=D0=BF=D0=BE=D1=80=D1=82=D0=B8=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD');
        }
       =20
        function downloadFile(content, filename, type) {
            const blob =3D new Blob([content], { type });
            const url =3D URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const link =3D document.createElement'a');
            link.href =3D =
url;
            link.download =3D filename;
            link.click();
            URL.r=
evokeObjectURL(url);
        }
       =20
        // =D0=9E=D1=87=D0=B8=D1=81=D1=82=D0=
=BA=D0=B0 =D0=B2=D1=81=D0=B5=D1=85 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D1=85
        function clearAll() {
            if (confirm('=
=D0=A3=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BB=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C =D0=92=D0=A1=D0=95 =D0=B7=D0=B0=
=D0=BF=D0=B8=D1=81=D0=B8? =D0=AD=D1=82=D0=BE =D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D1=82=
=D0=B2=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D0=BD=D0=B5=D0=BB=D1=8C=D0=B7=D1=8F =D0=BE=D1=82=D0=BC=
=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=82=D1=8C!')<=
/span>) {
                localStorage.removeItem(=
'cs2drops');
                document.getElementById(=
'tableBody').innerHTML =3D ''=
;
                drops =3D [];
                addRow();
                updateSummary();
                showNotification('=D0=92=
=D1=81=D0=B5 =D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B5 =D1=83=D0=B4=D0=B0=D0=BB=
=D0=B5=D0=BD=D1=8B');
            }
        }
       =20
        // =D0=98=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=86=D0=B8=D0=
=B0=D0=BB=D0=B8=D0=B7=D0=B0=D1=86=D0=B8=D1=8F
        loadDatabase();
        updateCacheCounter();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

    = =F0=9F=94=A5 =D0=A7=D1=82=D0=BE =D0=B4=D0=BE=D0=B1=D0=B0=D0=B2=D0=BB=D0=B5= =D0=BD=D0=BE:

    1. =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=BB=D0=BD=D0=B0=D1=8F =D0= =B1=D0=B0=D0=B7=D0=B0 =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2 (ByMyke= l CSGO-API)

    • =D0=97=D0=B0=D0=B3=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B7=D0=BA=D0=B0 150= 0+ =D1=81=D0=BA=D0=B8=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B2 =D0=B8 =D0=B2=D1= =81=D0=B5=D1=85 =D0=BA=D0=B5=D0=B9=D1=81=D0=BE=D0=B2 =D0=BD=D0=B0= =D0=BF=D1=80=D1=8F=D0=BC=D1=83=D1=8E =D1=81 GitHub
    • =D0=9F=D0=BE=D0=B4=D0=B4=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B6=D0=BA=D0=B0 =D1=80=D1=83=D1=81=D1=81=D0=BA=D0=BE=D0=B3=D0=BE =D1=8F=D0=B7=D1=8B=D0= =BA=D0=B0 (ru/skins_not_grouped.json)
    • =D0=94=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=BD=D1=8B=D0=B5 =D0=B2=D0=BA=D0= =BB=D1=8E=D1=87=D0=B0=D1=8E=D1=82: =D0=BE=D1=80=D1=83=D0=B6=D0=B8=D0=B5, = =D0=BF=D0=B0=D1=82=D1=82=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=BD, =D1=80=D0=B5=D0=B4=D0=BA=D0=BE= =D1=81=D1=82=D1=8C, =D0=B8=D0=B7=D0=BD=D0=BE=D1=81 (FN/MW/FT/WW/BS), StatTr= ak, =D0=B8=D0=B7=D0=BE=D0=B1=D1=80=D0=B0=D0=B6=D0=B5=D0=BD=D0=B8=D1=8F
    • Fuzzy search: =D0=B8=D1= =89=D0=B5=D1=82 =D0=BF=D0=BE =D1=87=D0=B0=D1=81=D1=82=D0=B8 =D1=81=D0=BB=D0= =BE=D0=B2=D0=B0 ("rev" =E2=86=92 "Revolution Case", "ak red" =E2=86=92 "AK-= 47 | Redline")

    2. =D0=A3=D0=BC=D0=BD=D0=BE=D0=B5= =D0=BA=D1=8D=D1=88=D0=B8=D1=80=D0=BE=D0=B2=D0=B0=D0=BD=D0=B8=D0=B5 =D1=86= =D0=B5=D0=BD

https://statics.moonshot.cn/kimi-web-seo/assets/Index-CyCE2Pdm.css @charset "utf-8"; .black-share-card[data-v-f31366c3] { width: 400px; height: 72px; background= -color: var(--Fills-F1); box-sizing: border-box; padding: 16px; gap: 10px; = border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: c= enter; margin-top: 16px; } .card-image[data-v-f31366c3] { width: 48px; height: 48px; } .card-info[data-v-f31366c3] { flex: 1 1 0%; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14= px; line-height: 20px; } .card-info-title[data-v-f31366c3] { color: var(--Labels-Primary); } .card-info-content[data-v-f31366c3] { color: var(--Labels-Tertiary); } .card-button[data-v-f31366c3] { width: 72px; min-width: 72px; height: 32px;= transition: background-color 0.2s ease-in-out; color: var(--Labels-Primary= ) !important; border: none !important; background-color: var(--Bg-Tertiary)= !important; } .card-button[data-v-f31366c3]:hover { background-color: var(--Fills-F1) !im= portant; } .memory-detail-container[data-v-e5226e22] { width: 360px; box-sizing: borde= r-box; padding: 16px 8px 8px; border: .5px solid var(--Separators-S1); bord= er-radius: 8px; box-shadow: rgba(0, writer-Regular-D3Ib7_Hf.ttf") format("truetype"); } .katex { font: 1.21em / 1.2 KaTeX_Main, "Times New Roman", serif; text-inde= nt: 0px; text-rendering: auto; } .katex * { border-color: currentcolor; } .katex .katex-version::after { content: "0.16.25"; } .katex .katex-mathml { clip: rect(1px, 1px, 1px, 1px); border: 0px; height:= 1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; width: 1px; } .katex .katex-html > .newline { display: block; } .katex .base { position: relative; white-space: nowrap; width: min-content;= } .katex .base, .katex .strut { display: inline-block; } .katex .textbf { font-weight: 700; } .katex .textit { font-style: italic; } .katex .textrm { font-family: KaTeX_Main; } .katex .textsf { font-family: KaTeX_SansSerif; } .katex .texttt { font-family: KaTeX_Typewriter; } .katex .mathnormal { font-family: KaTeX_Math; font-style: italic; } .katex .mathit { font-family: KaTeX_Main; font-style: italic; } .katex .mathrm { font-style: normal; } .katex .mathbf { font-family: KaTeX_Main; font-weight: 700; } .katex .boldsymbol { font-family: KaTeX_Math; font-style: italic; font-weig= ht: 700; } .katex .amsrm, .katex .mathbb, .katex .textbb { font-family: KaTeX_AMS; } .katex .mathcal { font-family: KaTeX_Caligraphic; } .katex .mathfrak, .katex .textfrak { font-family: KaTeX_Fraktur; } .katex .mathboldfrak, .katex .textboldfrak { font-family: KaTeX_Fraktur; fo= nt-weight: 700; } .katex .mathtt { font-family: KaTeX_Typewriter; } .katex .mathscr, .katex .textscr { font-family: KaTeX_Script; } .katex .mathsf, .katex .textsf { font-family: KaTeX_SansSerif; } .katex .mathboldsf, .katex .textboldsf { font-family: KaTeX_SansSerif; font= -weight: 700; } .katex .mathitsf, .katex .mathsfit, .katex .textitsf { font-family: KaTeX_S= ansSerif; font-style: italic; } .katex .mainrm { font-family: KaTeX_Main; font-style: normal; } .katex .vlist-t { border-collapse: collapse; display: inline-table; table-l= ayout: fixed; } .katex .vlist-r { display: table-row; } .katex .vlist { display: table-cell; position: relative; vertical-align: bo= ttom; } .katex .vlist > span { display: block; height: 0px; position: relative; } .katex .vlist > span > span { display: inline-block; } .katex .vlist > span > .pstrut { overflow: hidden; width: 0px; } .katex .vlist-t2 { margin-right: -2px; } .katex .vlist-s { display: table-cell; .hbox, .katex .thinbox { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: row; = } .katex .thinbox { max-width: 0px; width: 0px; } .katex .msupsub { text-align: left; } .katex .mfrac > span > span { text-align: center; } .katex .mfrac .frac-line { border-bottom-style: solid; display: inline-bloc= k; width: 100%; } .katex .hdashline, .katex .hline, .katex .mfrac .frac-line, .katex .overlin= e .overline-line, .katex .rule, .katex .underline .underline-line { min-hei= ght: 1px; } .katex .mspace { display: inline-block; } .katex .clap, .katex .llap, .katex .rlap { position: relative; width: 0px; = } .katex .clap > .inner, .katex .llap > .inner, .katex .rlap > .inner { posit= ion: absolute; } .katex .clap > .fix, .katex .llap > .fix, .katex .rlap > .fix { display: in= line-block; } .katex .llap > .inner { right: 0px; } .katex .clap > .inner, .katex .rlap > .inner { left: 0px; } .katex .clap > .inner > span { margin-left: -50%; margin-right: 50%; } .katex .rule { border: 0px solid; display: var(--Fills-F2); background-color: var(--Bg= Gp-Secondary); display: flex; flex-flow: column; gap: 24px; } .plan-pin[data-v-de07d016] { position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 10px; } .plan-pin .pin-icon[data-v-de07d016] { color: rgb(194, 194, 194); position:= absolute; left: 16px; bottom: 22px; } .plan-pin .pin-text[data-v-de07d016] { padding: 4px 8px; background-color: =
